shortDescription: Industrial-chic 1-bedroom loft in Queen West with soaring ceilings and exposed brick.
fullDescription: Welcome to 400 Queen Street West, Unit 605 in the vibrant Queen West neighbourhood. This converted loft showcases soaring ceilings, exposed structural elements, and an open industrial aesthetic. The main living area impresses with nine-foot ceilings, designer fixtures, and a seamless flow between rooms. The kitchen has been fully renovated with soft-close cabinetry, stone counters, and a breakfast bar. All 1 bedrooms are generously sized, and the primary offers a spa-inspired four-piece ensuite. The finished lower level adds valuable living space with a recreation room, extra bathroom, and storage. The location is unbeatable: steps to TTC transit, acclaimed restaurants, and everyday shopping.
keyFeatures: Renovated galley kitchen with breakfast bar
Cosy living room with gas fireplace
